programme.title: The Bank Job
programme.desc: A reformed ex-con has settled into life as a car dealer with a wife and kids. But when he hears of a chance for a foolproof bank heist, it&amp;apos;s an opportunity he just can&amp;apos;t resist.

programme.title: The Darkest Minds
programme.desc: On her birthday, Ruby discovers a series of new and frightening abilities, forcing her parents to send her away to a government camp.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men
programme.desc: A small Texan town becomes the centre of a chain reaction of violence when a local hunter stumbles upon some dead bodies, a stash of heroin, and $2 million in cash near the Rio Grande.

programme.title: I Still Believe
programme.desc: The true story of Christian music mega star Jeremy Camp and his remarkable journey of love and loss that looks to prove that there is always hope, even in the midst of tragedy.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: As a planet-killing comet hurtles towards Earth, John Garrity, his estranged wife, and their son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary.

programme.title: Rush
programme.desc: The exhilarating true story of two of the greatest rivals the sport of Formula One has ever witnessed - James Hunt versus Niki Lauda and their illustrious Formula 1 racing teams, McLaren versus Ferrari.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Desperate to be just like the top cops on the force, two misfit detectives break free from their desk jobs and stumble onto the biggest case of their careers.

programme.title: The Social Network
programme.desc: In 2003, Harvard undergrad Mark Zuckerberg starts work on an idea that will become Facebook. Six years and 500 million friends later, Zuckerberg is one of the youngest billionaires ever, but success leads to personal and legal complications.

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask
programme.desc: When France&amp;apos;s King Louis XIV abuses his power, three retired musketeers leap back into action to replace him with his long-hidden twin brother.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: In 1800s Arizona, a small-time rancher agrees to escort a criminal to his trial in Yuma. But danger looms at every turn, and the outlaw&amp;apos;s men are in pursuit.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: A small town hires seven mercenaries to protect them from an evil industrialist and his private army.

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: An elderly Margaret Thatcher and her husband's ghost reflect on her life - from childhood to becoming the longest serving British Prime Minister.

programme.title: Hereditary
programme.desc: After the matriarch of the Graham family passes away, her daughter's family begin to unearth cryptic and disturbing secrets about their ancestry.

programme.title: The Martian
programme.desc: During a mission to Mars, Astronaut Mark Watney is presumed dead and left behind. Against all odds, Watney must find a way to survive on an inhospitable planet, and contact Earth in the hopes that they can bring him home.

programme.title: The English Patient
programme.desc: In an abandoned monastery at the end of World War II, a young nurse tends to a severely burned plane crash victim. His past is shown in flashbacks, revealing a fateful love affair.
During the height of the Great War, two young British soldiers embark on a dangerous mission through enemy territory.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: Forget what you think you know about the formidable Muhammad Ali, this is the real story - from 1964 to 1974, from religion to politics and into the ring.

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: This foot-stomping celebration traces the story of legendary rock band Queen, their unforgettable music, and their extraordinary lead singer, Freddie Mercury.

programme.title: Country Strong
programme.desc: A country legend with a drinking problem goes on a comeback tour with a rising star. However, old demons threaten the tour's success.

programme.title: The Matrix
programme.desc: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to the underworld, he discovers the life he knows is an elaborate deception. Neo joins rebel warrior Morpheus in the battle to destroy the illusion enslaving humanity.

programme.title: Arrival
programme.desc: When giant spaceships touch down across Earth, a linguistics professor is called in to find a way to communicate with the extra-terrestrial visitors and prevent a global war.

programme.title: I Am Legend
programme.desc: A devastating plague has killed most of humanity and transformed the rest into vampire-like monsters. In New York, a sole survivor spends his days desperately searching for a cure, and his nights barricaded against bloodthirsty attacks.

programme.title: Funny Girl
programme.desc: The vibrant and beautiful Fanny Brice starts out as a bit player on the vaudeville stage and works her way up to stardom on Broadway.

programme.title: Seems Like Old Times
programme.desc: Wrongfully accused of a bank robbery, a writer seeks help from his ex-wife, who&amp;amp;amp;apos;s now married to the soon-to-be Attorney General of California.

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: A chance meeting with a beguiling woman shatters the dreams of a young baseballer. Sixteen years later, he is given another shot at the big leagues.

programme.title: Requiem For a Heavyweight
programme.desc: After suffering a brutal defeat and being told he can no longer fight, boxer Louis &amp;amp;amp;apos;Mountain&amp;amp;amp;apos; Rivera struggles to find a new direction in life.

programme.title: Sands of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: Marine Sergeant John Stryker is despised by his recruits for his brutal training methods. But they will need all of Stryker&amp;amp;amp;apos;s battle tactics if they want to survive one of the bloodiest engagements of the war: the Battle of Iwo Jima.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: Over the course of 30 years, a widowed mother and her daughter navigate their complicated relationship and life&amp;amp;amp;apos;s dramas.

programme.title: The Silence of the Lambs
programme.desc: A young FBI agent must receive the help of an incarcerated psychopathic murderer in order to catch another ruthless serial killer.

programme.title: Romy and Michele&amp;amp;amp;apos;s High School Reunion
programme.desc: Two best friends try to pass themselves off as rich and successful when they go to their high school reunion.

programme.title: Rain Man
programme.desc: After the death of their father, an ambitious yuppie and his autistic brother embark on a voyage of discovery.

programme.title: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: When Helen is fired and rushes out to catch a train home, her life splits into two parallel realities. In one world, she catches the train; in the other, she misses it - one split second leads her on two different journeys of the heart.

programme.title: The Deer Hunter
programme.desc: The lives of three small-town steel mill workers are changed forever after fighting in the Vietnam War, the experience leaving them with terrible physical and psychological wounds.

programme.title: Birdy
programme.desc: The story of the friendship between Al and Birdy - from their childhoods to their scarred and traumatised lives as Vietnam veterans.

programme.title: Much Ado About Nothing
programme.desc: Shakespeare&amp;amp;amp;apos;s springtime tale about two love affairs, both assisted and complicated by scheming busybodies.

programme.title: Lord of the Flies
programme.desc: After their plane crash lands on a desert island, a group of schoolboys find themselves deprived of adult supervision.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: In the untamed territory of Montana, a gang of cattle thieves seek revenge when one of its members is killed by a wealthy rancher.

programme.title: La Bamba
programme.desc: The biographical story of singer Ritchie Valens, whose promising life was cut short by a plane crash.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: In the 1960s, a young American soldier arrives in Vietnam, and discovers he must battle not only the Viet Cong, but also the fear, exhaustion and intense anger growing within him.

programme.title: The Silent Partner
programme.desc: A bank teller anticipates a robbery and steals most of the cash himself. When the deception is exposed, a chilling game of cat and mouse ensues.

programme.title: The Princess Bride
programme.desc: A classic fairy tale, with swordfights, giants, an evil prince, a beautiful princess, a few pirates, and yes, some kissing (as read by a kindly grandfather).

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: A group of misfit cowboys come together to right wrongs, fight corruption and bring down an evil sheriff in the town of Silverado.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: After being betrayed by his partner in a train heist, an outlaw teams up with a bodyguard to exact his revenge.

programme.title: L.A. Confidential
programme.desc: As corruption, crime, and deceit permeate the glamorous world of 1950s Hollywood, three L.A. detectives work to clean it all up.

programme.title: The Sixth Sense
programme.desc: A young boy, who is haunted by dead people that only he can see, seeks the help of a child psychologist.

programme.title: Major League: Back to the Minors
programme.desc: The South Carolina Buzz is about to face off against the Minnesota Twins. Unfortunately, the Buzz are nine players short of a dream team.

programme.title: Requiem For a Heavyweight
programme.desc: After suffering a brutal defeat and being told he can no longer fight, boxer Louis &amp;apos;Mountain&amp;apos; Rivera struggles to find a new direction in life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The eccentric lifestyle of the Addams family is threatened when the family lawyer and a greedy mother and son conspire to steal the family fortune.

programme.title: ...And Justice for All
programme.desc: A lawyer, disgusted with legal corruption, is forced to defend a judge he despises in a rape trial. If he doesn&amp;apos;t do it, the judge will have him disbarred.

programme.title: The Passenger
programme.desc: A world-weary American journalist discovers the body of a stranger and decides to assume the dead man's identity. But he soon learns the man was an arms dealer with dangerous friends and enemies.

programme.title: Raging Bull
programme.desc: The true story of the life of boxer Jake LaMotta, whose violence and temper led him to the top in the ring, but destroyed his life outside of it.

programme.title: Nothing in Common
programme.desc: On his way up the corporate ladder, David Basner confronts his greatest challenge - his father.

programme.title: Arizona Dream
programme.desc: A young man reluctantly leaves New York to attend the wedding of his uncle in Arizona and ends up in some very strange situations.

programme.title: One From the Heart
programme.desc: On the anniversary of their five-year romance, Hank and Frannie decide to go their separate ways. Over one night in Las Vegas, they each seek comfort elsewhere. Featuring songs by Tom Waits and Crystal Gale.

programme.title: Dirty Dancing
programme.desc: In the summer of 1963, 17-year-old Frances "Baby" Houseman vacations with her parents at a resort, where she meets Johnny the hotel dance instructor, who is as experienced at life as Baby is naive.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: Matilda is a super-smart little girl who's woefully misunderstood by her parents, her brother, and an evil school principal. With the help of a wonderful teacher, Matilda discovers she doesn't have to get mad to get even.

programme.title: Seems Like Old Times
programme.desc: Wrongfully accused of a bank robbery, a writer seeks help from his ex-wife, who's now married to the soon-to-be Attorney General of California.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
programme.desc: A New York socialite's carefree existence catches the attention of a young writer who has moved into her apartment building.

programme.title: The Man Who Would Be King
programme.desc: Two British soldiers in India resign from the Army and set themselves up as rulers in Kafiristan.

programme.title: Amos & Andrew
programme.desc: An African-American man moves to a wealthy white suburb, where buffoonish local cops mistake him for a burglar, then get a petty criminal to take him hostage to avoid a scandal.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Two buddies - one blind, the other deaf - go on the run to solve a murder and clear their names.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Meet the Devil. She's lusty, drop-dead gorgeous, and she's giving Elliott seven wishes. However, he's going to get more than he bargained for.

programme.title: The Guns of Navarone
programme.desc: In 1943 a team of crack commandos are assembled for a seemingly impossible mission: destroy the German guns on the Greek Island of Navarone.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Time for bed! We&amp;amp;amp;apos;ll see you first thing in the morning.

programme.title: Ghosthunters: On Icy Trails
programme.desc: An easily scared young boy, a professional ghosthunter, and a slimy ghost team up to save their town from the next ice age.

programme.title: 10 Lives
programme.desc: After carelessly losing his ninth life, a pampered and selfish cat is offered one last chance to become a better version of himself.

programme.title: Once Upon A Forest
programme.desc: When a toxic spill poisons their friend, a mouse, a mole, and a hedgehog embark on a treacherous journey to find a cure.

programme.title: Asterix: The Secret of the Magic Potion
programme.desc: Asterix and Obelix help Getafix search for a young druid worthy of succeeding him, all while an old nemesis seeks to steal the recipe for his legendary magic potion.

programme.title: City of Ember
programme.desc: The city of Ember was built as an underground refuge for the human race - but now their power supply is fading. When Lina finds part of an ancient message she is sure it holds the secret that will save the city.

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks
programme.desc: Three musical chipmunks are discovered by an aspiring songwriter who wants to use their amazing singing abilities to become famous.

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: Chipwrecked
programme.desc: The Chipmunks and Chipettes take a holiday and turn a luxury cruise liner into their personal playground - until they fall over board and end up &amp;amp;amp;quot;Chipwrecked&amp;amp;amp;quot; on a tropical remote island.

programme.title: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Road Chip
programme.desc: Music-making chipmunks Alvin, Simon and Theodore hit the road on a cross-country mission to stop their guardian Dave from proposing to his girlfriend.

programme.title: Anastasia
programme.desc: A young girl heads from Russia to Paris, hoping to learn if she could be the long lost princess Anastasia. But she and her heroic companions must face the dastardly wizard Rasputin who has sworn to destroy the Russian royal family.

programme.title: Kangaroo
programme.desc: Stranded in an Outback town, a down-on-his-luck TV star forms an unlikely friendship with a spirited young Indigenous girl when they team up to rescue orphaned joeys. Based on a heart-warming true story.

programme.title: Anchors Up
programme.desc: After pulling off a daring rescue, a young boat is recruited by a larger harbour. However, he soon realises that bigger is not always better.

programme.title: My Freaky Family
programme.desc: On the cusp of her 13th birthday, Betty just wants to fit in with her magical, musical family. But there&amp;amp;amp;apos;s a lot that she doesn&amp;amp;amp;apos;t yet know.

programme.title: Thumbelina
programme.desc: Thumbelina meets and falls in love with Cornelius, a fairy prince. Just as everything is going right, Thumbelina is kidnapped by Ms Toad.

programme.title: Rabbit School: Guardians of the Golden Egg
programme.desc: A city rabbit gets trapped in an old-fashioned school. The school uses archaic methods to protect the Golden Egg from a family of cunning foxes.

programme.title: Sherlock Gnomes
programme.desc: Gnomeo and Juliet look to the legendary Sherlock Gnomes to solve the case of a mass gnome abduction.

programme.title: Paddington In Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and the Brown family head to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy. A thrilling adventure ensues when a mystery plunges them into a unexpected journey through the Amazon.

programme.desc: A young puppy wants to play with his older siblings, but they&amp;apos;re all too busy. Instead, the puppy befriends a couple of scheming cats.

programme.desc: A brave young panda travels from China to Africa to rescue his best friend, Jielong the Dragon, who has been kidnapped. Along the way, he discovers an amazing new world of mountains, deserts and jungles.
